# PuPageHeader

## Intent

- page header
- page title
- page actions
- page metadata

## Prefer When

- Use for neutral page titles with optional subtitle, metadata row, and right-aligned actions.

## Avoid When

- Avoid custom page header markup when this component covers the structure.

## Import

```ts
import { PuPageHeader } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `as`
- `title`
- `subtitle`
- `titleAs`
- `showBack`
- `backLabel`
- `size`
- `variant`

## Slots

- `actions`
- `back-icon`
- `meta`
- `subtitle`
- `title`

## Events

- `back`

## Composition

- PuButton
- PuChip

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuPageHeader.story.vue`

- Basic
- Sizes
- Back And Actions
- No Subtitle
- Custom Slots
- Meta Row
- Variants

## Types

- `PuPageHeaderSize`
- `PuPageHeaderTitleAs`
- `PuPageHeaderVariant`

## Caveats

- PuPageHeader is neutral; it has no tone prop.
- The structure is fixed to a main row and an optional meta row; there is no layout prop and no body/default slot.
- Use the shared PuSize vocabulary for header scale; there is no density prop.
- Use variant plain for no separator and variant line for a bottom separator.
